title: rosa × dumetorum subvar. trichoidea
intro: Rosa × dumetorum subvar. trichoidea, also known as Tricho Rose or Prickly Rose, is a thorny, perennial shrub that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Rosa × dumetorum subvar. trichoidea include the potential to treat various conditions such as skin issues, wounds, and infections, due to its antimicrobial and antiseptic properties. Rosa × dumetorum subvar. trichoidea can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its flowers and leaves can also be used in skincare products and herbal salves.
